title: Tools, Machines, and Everyday Items Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Things that are used for a special job or task, like tools or machines.
choices: equipment
folder
shield
rounds.answer: equipment
rounds.explanation: equipment: Things that are used for a special job or task, like tools or machines.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Useful materials or tools for work or learning, like books, tools, or money.
choices: equipment
folder
resources
rounds.answer: resources
rounds.explanation: resources: Useful materials or tools for work or learning, like books, tools, or money.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A cream or gel you put on a toothbrush to clean your teeth.
choices: folder
toothpaste
equipment
rounds.answer: toothpaste
rounds.explanation: toothpaste: A cream or gel you put on a toothbrush to clean your teeth.

games.title: Spelling Builder

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A piece of cloth that hangs in front of a window or on a stage.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.

rounds.answer: attic
